enum_values.name: LOAD_FORM_LINE_1
enum_values.summary: The load magnitude is uniform across the loaded length.

enum_values.name: LOAD_FORM_LINE_2
enum_values.summary: The load has different magnitudes at the ends of the loaded length. The magnitude changes linearly between the ends.

enum_values.name: LOAD_FORM_LINE_3
enum_values.summary: The load magnitude changes linearly, from zero at the ends of the loaded length, to a fixed value in the middle of the loaded length.

enum_values.name: LOAD_FORM_LINE_4
enum_values.summary: The load magnitude changes linearly, from zero at one end of the loaded length, through two (different) values, back to zero at the other end.
